title: Light and dark mode
excerpt: Hi, I would love to be able to select per board and per dashboard if I want a dark or light setting. Settings right now changes everything - it would be great to select individually if needed… Tks and wishing you  great …

posts.author: Jocelyne (Jocelyne Leroux)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I would love to be able to select per board and per dashboard if I want a dark or light setting. Settings right now changes everything - it would be great to select individually if needed… Tks and wishing you great day!

posts.author: Blanche (Blanche Donnery)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with you Jocelyne
